Decades of Driveway Expertise

Calwest Paving Co. started with a simple goal: to provide San Francisco residents with durable, beautiful driveways that stand the test of time. Founded by a team of seasoned paving professionals, we've built our reputation on quality workmanship and unwavering dedication to customer satisfaction.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our driveway paving services.

How long will an asphalt driveway last in San Francisco?

With proper maintenance, an asphalt driveway can last 20-30 years in the San Francisco climate. Sealcoating every 2-3 years will significantly extend its lifespan.

How much does an asphalt driveway cost?

The cost depends on the size of the driveway, the thickness of the asphalt, and any necessary site preparation. Contact us for a free estimate tailored to your specific needs.

How long does it take to install an asphalt driveway?

Most asphalt driveway installations take 1-3 days, depending on the size and complexity of the project.

"Calwest Paving Co. sealcoated our asphalt driveway and it looks brand new! The team was professional and thorough, and the price was very competitive. I appreciate the attention to detail."
